overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through Night City. The player character moves from beneath an overpass alongside a distinctive red mega-tower toward an industrial district with large spherical storage tanks. The scene features bright midday sunlight, futuristic architecture, and sparse pedestrian traffic on a wide sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban sidewalk beneath elevated overpass

events.description: passing a pedestrian in dark clothing walking in the same direction on the left
passing a vertical street lamp pole that temporarily obscures view of the red tower

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the metal overpass structure, approaching the red cylindrical tower

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark jacket and shorts walking parallel to ego

entered.detail: large green and orange metal beams forming an overhead bridge with support columns
massive red and black cylindrical corporate building with geometric panel patterns
tall tower with red and white horizontal stripes and circular platforms
silver horizontal metal bars lining the left edge of the walkway
tall black pole with illuminated orange light fixture

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a large metal overpass structure with green and orange beams. The camera moves forward along a concrete sidewalk bordered by metal railings on the left and an asphalt road on the right. A distinctive red cylindrical mega-tower dominates the right side of the frame, growing larger as the camera approaches. Pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction, and the bright midday sun casts sharp shadows across the futuristic urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone between commercial and industrial districts

events.description: red mega-tower begins to recede on the right as spherical industrial tanks come into view ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved sidewalk as the red tower passes by on the right, entering the industrial area

entered.detail: large silver spherical storage tanks with reflective surfaces in the industrial district
vertical billboard displaying purple and blue neon graphics with text
elevated metal walkway or pipe structure spanning across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the red cylindrical tower, which recedes into the background on the right. The overpass structure and striped chimney disappear behind as the scene opens into full sunlight. Large spherical industrial tanks become visible in the distance on the right, signaling the transition to an industrial zone. A neon billboard appears on the left building facade, and an elevated pipe structure crosses overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront walkway with storage facilities

events.description: walking past a large vertical digital billboard structure on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial zone with large spherical tanks prominently visible on the right side

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in light colored jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall rectangular advertising screen mounted on the industrial building facade
low-rise industrial building with corrugated metal siding and large windows
tall electrical transmission towers with multiple cable lines

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves deeper into the industrial district with the large spherical tanks now prominent on the right side. The red mega-tower has completely exited the frame behind. The camera passes industrial warehouse buildings on the left featuring large digital billboards. Utility pylons rise in the distance on the right, and the walkway continues straight through the sunlit industrial environment with metal railings lining the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the shaded depths of a city overpass into a bright, open industrial district. It begins beneath a metal structure of green and orange beams, moving along a concrete sidewalk as a massive red cylindrical mega-tower looms over the right side of the frame. As the camera passes the tower and the overpass recedes, the scene opens into full midday sunlight, revealing elevated pipes overhead and large spherical storage tanks appearing in the distance. The environment then shifts further into the industrial zone, where the red tower disappears entirely and is replaced by warehouse buildings with large digital billboards on the left. Finally, the camera continues straight along the metal-railed walkway toward distant utility pylons under a clear, bright sky.
